events.title: US Launches Fresh Strikes on Iran
events.desc: The US military announced it completed its latest wave of strikes on Iran, targeting command centers, air defense sites, missile and drone capabilities, and coastal surveillance facilities. This escalation comes amid ongoing conflict over the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Iran Warns Strait of Hormuz is 'Red Line'
events.desc: Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz an 'inviolable red line' and threatened to strike all infrastructure in the Gulf region if the US attacks its infrastructure. This statement follows the US reimposition of a naval blockade on Iranian ports.

events.title: US Strikes Iran and Tanker
events.desc: The United States conducted strikes on Iran and a tanker amidst the ongoing conflict over the Strait of Hormuz. Tehran responded by targeting Kuwait and Jordan.

events.title: Iran Launches Missiles at Saudi Arabia
events.desc: Yemen's Houthi rebels launched missiles at Saudi Arabia, targeting Abha airport in retaliation for strikes on Sanaa airport. The Houthis blamed Saudi Arabia for an attack on Yemen's capital.

events.title: US-Iran Exchanges Escalate Over Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US and Iran have been trading strikes, with Iran claiming to have attacked US military assets in Kuwait, Jordan, Bahrain, and Oman shortly after new US attacks. The conflict is centered around control of the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: US Issues Sanctions to Disrupt Iran's Weapon Procurement
events.desc: The US government imposed sanctions on individuals and entities involved in an international network that allegedly helps Iran procure weapons. Targets include Iranian and Russian nationals and entities in Iran, Russia, and Nigeria.

events.title: Lebanon and Israel Conclude US-Brokered Talks
events.desc: Lebanon and Israel have concluded US-brokered talks in Rome, making progress on a plan that could lead to an Israeli withdrawal from parts of southern Lebanon. This follows rounds of negotiations amidst the ongoing regional conflict.

events.title: US House Defeats Bid to Cut Off Israel Aid
events.desc: The US House of Representatives voted down an amendment to cease aid to Israel, highlighting a division within the Democratic party over the country's actions in Gaza.

events.title: Exclusive: US Strikes on Iran Strengthen Options for Escalation
events.desc: Recent US strikes on Iran, aimed at opening the Strait of Hormuz, are also targeting Iranian military capabilities that the US might want to neutralize before undertaking more complex operations, according to US officials.

events.title: US Launches Wave of Strikes on Iran
events.desc: The US conducted a wave of strikes on Iran, with targets including Bandar Abbas, Iran's primary port city on the Strait of Hormuz. This action is part of the ongoing conflict in the region.

events.title: Iran Warns of Resistance Until the End
events.desc: Iran has issued a stark warning that the Strait of Hormuz is a 'red line' and that it will resist until the end. This statement comes as the US reimposed a naval blockade on Iranian ports.

events.title: US and Iran Trade Fire as Tensions Rise
events.desc: The United States and Iran are exchanging fire, significantly raising tensions over the Strait of Hormuz. Iran claims to have struck US military assets in multiple regional locations.

events.title: Israeli Strike Kills Seven in North Gaza
events.desc: An Israeli strike on a police post in northern Gaza has resulted in the deaths of seven people, including a senior Hamas police officer. Israel claims the targets were 'terrorists'.

events.title: UAE Condemns Iran's Attack on Tankers
events.desc: The UAE has condemned Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers, as the US launched further strikes on Iran. The US also announced a 20% charge as part of a new blockade on the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: US Insists Strait of Hormuz Open Amid Exchange of Strikes
events.desc: Despite Iran's declaration of closing the Strait of Hormuz and launching attacks on US allies, the US maintains that the waterway remains open.
